The '''Ace-6 droid brain''',<ref name="Databank">{{DB|starship|tiedfighter|TIE/D fighter}}</ref> also known as the '''Ace-6 fighter unit''',<ref name="EGVV" /> or simply '''Ace-6 unit''',<ref name="Nintendo">''[[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron: The Official Nintendo Player's Guide]]''</ref> was a model of [[Droid brain/Legends|droid brain]] produced by [[Cybot Galactica/Legends|Cybot Galactica]]. The units were used by the [[Imperial Remnant]] and the reborn [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] in the [[TIE/D automated starfighter]]. The units weighed less than ten [[Kilogram/Legends|kilograms]] and could be installed into any [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] with a compatible [[Computer/Legends|computer]] interface. Advanced [[Logic circuit/Legends|logic circuits]] were meant to give the [[Droid/Legends|droid]] brains the ability to produce the same kind of performance of organic [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]], although actual combat records indicated that living pilots were still superior.<ref name="EGVV" /> 

Although more advanced than the droid brains used by the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], they were no match for living pilots. The production of the TIE/D was halted due to the Remnant concluding that droids lacked the quick thinking and wit of living beings.<ref name="Databank" />
